title: HBS-Bank-Depth KPI Verification Rubric
description: Per-layer quality checks for AI supervisor verification gates. Each layer defines checks, pass threshold, and max redo attempts.

checks.description: structured.md 存在且文件大小 > 0 bytes
checks.check: structured.md exists and size > 0

checks.description: Section G 数据来源标记为 pdf_extraction，非 ai_knowledge_base
checks.check: data provenance in Section G is 'pdf_extraction', not 'ai_knowledge_base'

checks.description: Section A-G 至少有 5 个 section 有实质性内容
checks.check: at least 5 of Sections A-G contain substantive content (not just headers)

checks.description: Section A 财务表格至少包含 3 行数据
checks.check: Section A contains at least 3 rows of financial data in table format

checks.description: 文件内容不是错误消息或空模板
checks.check: content does not contain error messages like 'No PDF text extraction succeeded'

checks.description: leaf_values.json 存在且为有效 JSON
checks.check: leaf_values.json exists and is valid JSON

checks.description: data_provenance.source = pdf_extraction
checks.check: data_provenance.source is 'pdf_extraction', not 'ai_knowledge_base'

checks.description: values 对象至少包含 12 个指标
checks.check: values object has >= 12 entries

checks.description: 提取完整度 >= 0.5
checks.check: completeness ratio (non-null / total) >= 0.5

checks.description: 金额类指标单位一致（全部归一到百万元）
checks.check: monetary values are normalized to consistent unit (百万元)

checks.description: peer_benchmark.json 存在且为有效 JSON
checks.check: peer_benchmark.json exists and is valid JSON

checks.description: 至少有一个指标包含 percentile 字段（证明计算真实执行）
checks.check: at least one metric has a non-null percentile field

checks.description: 覆盖率至少 2 家银行（否则无同行比较意义）
checks.check: at least 2 banks have benchmark data

checks.description: data_provenance.source = peer_benchmark_computed
checks.check: data_provenance.source is 'peer_benchmark_computed'

checks.description: 不是错误占位文件（不是 {"error": "computation_failed"}）
checks.check: output is not just an error placeholder — real benchmark data exists

L1_bank_scan.description: Per-bank quantitative scan + text diff quality

checks.description: computed_metrics >= 15 项（覆盖率）
checks.check: computed_metrics object has >= 15 entries

checks.description: text_diff_signals 数组非空，至少 1 条含 cross_ref
checks.check: text_diff_signals array is non-empty with at least 1 entry containing cross_ref field

checks.description: curiosity_flags >= 3 条，至少 1 条 severity=high
checks.check: curiosity_flags has >= 3 entries with at least 1 severity='high'

checks.description: completeness >= 0.6
checks.check: completeness field >= 0.6

checks.description: data_provenance.source = pdf_extraction
checks.check: data_provenance.source is 'pdf_extraction'

checks.description: 输出通过 output_schema.json §PerBankScan 校验
checks.check: output validates against output_schema.json PerBankScan schema

checks.description: 关键字段名与output_schema一致 (severity非confidence, key_findings非qualitative_signals)
checks.check: key field names match output_schema definitions — no schema drift

checks.description: edge_handoff 数组非空，至少 1 条具体搜索主题
checks.check: edge_handoff has >= 1 concrete search topic (not generic)

checks.description: 实际搜索执行次数 >= budget 的 50%
checks.check: searches_completed >= budget * 0.5 (or search_budget_used >= 10 for default budget 20)

checks.description: edge_markers signals 数组 >= 5 条
checks.check: signals array in edge_markers.json has >= 5 entries

checks.description: 每条 signal 有非空 source_url
checks.check: every signal has a non-empty source_url field

checks.description: mosaic_themes 不存在或每条来自实际搜索结果
checks.check: mosaic_themes either absent or each theme backed by search results

checks.description: 每次搜索的 query 和结果摘要被记录
checks.check: each search has a recorded query string and result summary

checks.description: key_findings >= 5 条，每条含 source_section
checks.check: key_findings has >= 5 entries, each with source_section field

checks.description: narrative >= 100 字符，非模板填充
checks.check: narrative field >= 100 chars AND not a template placeholder

checks.description: 不包含 '{银行名} business strategy' 等占位符文本
checks.check: no strings match placeholder patterns like '{银行名} business strategy: focus areas per annual report'

checks.description: strategy_clarity/tone/credibility 均有具体评估
checks.check: all 3 management_assessment dimensions have specific evaluations (not generic)

checks.description: data_provenance.source = pdf_extraction
checks.check: data_provenance.source is 'pdf_extraction'

checks.description: L1 qual_handoff 中的所有问题均被回应
checks.check: all L1 qual_handoff questions are addressed in flags_resolved or flags_escalated

L5a_vice.description: Per-bank VOH scoring — Vice analyst (1 bank/spawn)

checks.description: 每家银行 per_bank_voh.json 包含全部 6 个 sub_scores (dpr_stability, dividend_resilience, cdp, customer_quality, marginal_profitability, long_termism)
checks.check: each per_bank_voh.json has all 6 sub_scores with score + rationale

checks.description: depth_report.md >= 2000 字符
checks.check: depth_report.md file >= 2000 characters

checks.description: curiosity_signals 引用具体指标或事件（非泛泛风险提示）
checks.check: each curiosity_signal references a specific metric, event, or trend with direction + magnitude

checks.description: 无模板占位符（如 {银行名}）
checks.check: no placeholder strings in output files

checks.description: depth_report.md 包含 narrative 段落
checks.check: depth_report.md has a narrative section

checks.description: CDP 和 Diversity 分数来源标注为 L0e 确定性计算
checks.check: cdp and diversity sub_scores have source: 'L0e'

L5b_chief.description: Cross-bank synthesis — Chief editor (1 global spawn)

checks.description: synthesis_report.md 包含所有银行的完整 VOH 排名表
checks.check: VOH ranking table includes all banks with all component scores

checks.description: >= 3 个跨银行主题，有验证注释
checks.check: >= 3 cross-bank themes each with validation note

checks.description: >= 3 个侦察建议，包含具体查询和数据来源
checks.check: >= 3 reconnaissance suggestions with specific query + data source

checks.description: synthesis_report.json 通过 JSON schema 校验
checks.check: synthesis_report.json validates against output_schema.json

checks.description: synthesis_report.md >= 2000 字符
checks.check: synthesis_report.md >= 2000 characters

checks.description: Chief 未修改 Vice 的分数（标记在 Edge Cases 中可以，直接覆盖不行）
checks.check: VOH scores in synthesis_report.json match per_bank_voh.json

template_detection_patterns: {银行名} business strategy: focus areas per annual report
Analysis of {银行名} risk disclosures from latest annual report
Board and executive information for {银行名}
Full qualitative analysis requires spawn-based deep reading
